text:
ふふふ……君が先の特訓を
クリアした際、私は言ったぞ。
「あの時点で言うことはない」とな。

あれでマスターと思うなかれ、だ！
あらゆる難題を超えてこその熟達者だ！

さあ、はじめようか。
新たなる

Heh heh. I did tell you after your last round of
boot camp, didn't I? That there was nothing
else I had to say to you at that point?

Well, don't think that makes you a master!
A master is someone who can overcome
ANY obstacle!
Now, let's begin... your new trial!
